name: Imura Envelope Co., Inc.
summary: Imura Envelope Co., Inc. engages in the manufacture and sale of paper, stationery, and other products in Japan. The company offers paper products, such as envelopes and bags. It is also involved in the planning and production of print and direct mail; and provision of sealing products, shipping, storage, and information processing businesses. In addition, the company engages in the advertising agency business; sale of computers and peripheral equipment; and development and production of software, as well as provides inkjet printing services. Imura Envelope Co., Inc. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
